name: dotfiles-agents
description: Shared specialist agents from this dotfiles setup.

interface.shortDescription: Specialist debug, review, verification, and simplification agents
interface.longDescription: A local Codex plugin that exposes the specialist agents managed in this dotfiles repo, including debugging, code review, log analysis, verification, and simplification prompts.
defaultPrompt: Use the debug agent to root-cause this issue
